schemaorg_recipe: {"@context":"https://schema.org/","@type":"Recipe","name":"15-MINUTE PANTRY TOMATO SOUP","description":"NOTE : I like to use high-quality canned tomatoes such as Muir Glen in this soup.","recipeYield":"4","recipeIngredient":["3 tablespoons unsalted butter","1 large onion, finely diced (about 1 1/2 cups)","Pinch of red pepper flakes","1/2 teaspoon dried oregano","1 tablespoon all-purpose flour","Two 28-ounce cans whole tomatoes (see Note above), with their juice","1/2 cup whole milk or heavy cream","Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper","2 tablespoons whiskey, vodka, or brandy (optional)","2 tablespoons extra-virgin olive oil","2 tablespoons chopped fresh herbs, such as parsley, basil, or chives (optional)"]}

Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
2 tablespoons chopped fresh herbs, such as parsley, basil, or chives (optional)
